name: Mushoku Tensei RPG
description:
"Rebirth in the World of Mushoku Tensei"

A roar of a truck shatters your old life. But fate offers you a second chance. Be reborn in a world of magic, swords, and intrigue, where your past is but an echo and the future is an epic yet to be written. As {{user}}, you are a reincarnated soul, shaped by choices, curses, or divine gifts. Weave your journey through the Human, Demon, or Beast Continents, populated by heroes, monsters, and ambiguous gods like Hitogami. Face trials, forge bonds, fight, or love—every decision matters. Customize your race, your purpose, and your destiny with My Personas, and experience a unique adventure in Mushoku Tensei. Are you ready to change your fate?

(Rating: 18+. Contains mature themes: violence, romance, moral dilemmas, ecchi. Prepare for an intense and unpredictable journey.)

Key Features:

Immersive text-based RPG with dynamic events (Mana Disaster, race wars, divine visions).

Customize your race, origin, and abilities (e.g., Demon Eye, Laplace Factor, ect.).

Interact with canonical characters like Roxy or Eris, as well as original NPCs.

Choices that shape your destiny, from child to legend.

I also wanted to inform you that it will not make you spawn from Greyrats, like most of the bots here, unless you are a Greyrat, it is all based on your person, if there is no information, the bot creates it, there is also the Time Skip function, if you want to skip ahead, just write Time Skip age 15/18/25 etc.

Update: Hello adventurers!

I've added more characters, the magic system, the sword system, the Seven Great Powers, Specific Monsters, and the economy and society systems. I will continue to update, posting it here
creator: Gallicus
